channel.title: Azure Blob Storage on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Blob Storage on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Entra ID-based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP
item.description:
Microsoft Entra ID-based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP is now generally available in all regions. It allows Entra ID identities, including guest users via Entra External Identities, to connect to Azure Blob Storage over SFTP.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Azure Storage Mover now supports migration from Google Cloud Storage (GCS)
item.description:
Azure Storage Mover Public Preview now supports cloud-to-cloud migration from Google Cloud Storage (GCS) to Azure Blob Storage. Migration uses the S3-compatible interface.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Client-side data integrity protections in Azure Blob Storage
item.description:
Azure Blob Storage now includes CRC64-NVME client-side data integrity protections in the latest Azure Blob SDKs for .NET, C++, and JavaScript. This builds on existing MD5 and server-side integrity validation support.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Mock runs for Azure Storage Actions – Validate before you execute
item.description:
Azure Storage Actions now supports mock runs in general availability. This lets users simulate task execution at full scale before making any changes to Azure Blob or Data Lake Storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS
item.description:
Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS in Azure Blob Storage is now generally available in all Azure regions. It adds a scope between container-level and single-blob access for SAS tokens.

  • Source: Azure Updates
